reference: My daughter had petit mal seizures from the age of eight to thirteen; however, she hasn't suffered any since then, and she is now nineteen. She is considering taking classes using lasers, and I am curious if the blinking lights of the laser could ever bring them on again, even though she outgrew them during puberty.
text: My daughter had potty mulch from the age of 8 to 13, however, she hasn't suffered any since then, and she is now 19. She is considering taking classes using lasers, and I am curious if the blinking lights of the laser could ever bring them on again, even though she outgrew them during puberty.
